hero.tagline: Verified convex hedges for wage-earner macro risk in frontier markets.

mission.body: We design and deploy permissionless convex-hedge instruments on EVM ecosystems, validated by structural econometrics before deployment. First instrument: Abrigo, for Colombian workers exposed to COP/USD macro risk.

what_is_d2pi.heading: What is d2-π?
what_is_d2pi.body: d2-π (DS2P Labs) is a research lab that designs convex financial instruments. π denotes the payoff; the ∂² operator captures convexity — the curvature of payoff with respect to the underlying. Every instrument the lab incubates must clear structural evidence before deployment.

abrigo.name: Abrigo
abrigo.description: Convex hedges for Colombian wage-earners — ∂²Π gamma
